$username..write: auth != null && ((!newData.exists() && data.val() === auth.uid) || (newData.exists() && newData.val() === auth.uid && (!data.exists() || data.val() === auth.uid)))

$gameId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('players').child('host').val() === auth.uid || data.child('players').child('joiner').val() === auth.uid || (!data.child('players').child('joiner').exists() && newData.child('players').child('host').val() === data.child('players').child('host').val() && newData.child('players').child('joiner').val() === auth.uid))
